36:["$","h3","h3-1",{"id":"继承inheritance","children":"继承（Inheritance）"}]
37:["$","ul","ul-4",{"children":["\n",["$","li","li-0",{"children":"继承是从现有类创建新类的机制，新类称为子类，现有类称为父类。子类继承了父类的属性和方法，可以增加新的功能或者重写父类的功能。"}],"\n",["$","li","li-1",{"children":"继承有助于代码的复用，避免重复定义相同的功能。"}],"\n",["$","li","li-2",{"children":["例如，",["$","code","code-0",{"children":"Car"}]," 类可以继承自 ",["$","code","code-1",{"children":"Vehicle"}]," 类，",["$","code","code-2",{"children":"Vehicle"}]," 定义了一些通用的属性和方法，而 ",["$","code","code-3",{"children":"Car"}]," 可以扩展或修改这些功能。"]}],"\n"]}]

3a:["$","ul","ul-5",{"children":["\n",["$","li","li-0",{"children":["多态是指相同的操作作用于不同的对象上时，表现出不同的行为。多态分为",["$","strong","strong-0",{"children":"编译时多态"}],"（方法重载）和",["$","strong","strong-1",{"children":"运行时多态"}],"（方法重写）。"]}],"\n",["$","li","li-1",{"children":"通过多态，子类可以替代父类，执行不同的实现，从而提高灵活性和可扩展性。"}],"\n",["$","li","li-2",{"children":["例如，",["$","code","code-0",{"children":"Car"}]," 类和 ",["$","code","code-1",{"children":"Truck"}]," 类可以都有一个 ",["$","code","code-2",{"children":"Move()"}]," 方法，但它们可以有不同的实现。"]}],"\n"]}]

85:["$","p","p-23",{"className":"$undefined","children":"{% endtabs %}"}]
86:["$","h3","h3-11",{"id":"抽象工厂模式abstract-factory-pattern","children":"抽象工厂模式（Abstract Factory Pattern）"}]
258:T4a7,classDiagram
    Shape <|.. Rectangle
    Shape <|.. Square
    Shape <|.. Circle
    Color <|.. Red
    Color <|.. Green
    Color <|.. Blue
    AbstractFactory <|-- ShapeFactory
    AbstractFactory <|-- ColorFactory
    FactoryProducer --> AbstractFactory
    ShapeFactory --> Shape
    ColorFactory --> Color

    class Shape {
        <<interface>>
        +void Draw()
    }

    class Rectangle {
        +void Draw()
    }

    class Square {
        +void Draw()
    }

    class Circle {
        +void Draw()
    }

    class Color {
        <<interface>>
        +void Fill()
    }

    class Red {
        +void Fill()
    }

    class Green {
        +void Fill()
    }

    class Blue {
        +void Fill()
    }

    class AbstractFactory {
        <<abstract>>
        +Shape GetShape(string shapeType)
        +Color GetColor(string colorType)
    }

    class ShapeFactory {
        +Shape GetShape(string shapeType)
        +Color GetColor(string colorType)
    }

    class ColorFactory {
        +Shape GetShape(string shapeType)
        +Color GetColor(string colorType)
    }

    class FactoryProducer {
        +static AbstractFactory GetFactory(string choice)
    }88:["$","$L1a1","mermaid-panel-7",{"source":"$258","title":"$undefined"}]

a0:["$","h3","h3-13",{"id":"建造者模式builder-pattern","children":"建造者模式（Builder Pattern）"}]
2ad:T535,classDiagram
    Item <|.. Burger
    Item <|.. ColdDrink
    Packing <|.. Wrapper
    Packing <|.. Bottle
    Burger <|.. VegBurger
    Burger <|.. ChickenBurger
    ColdDrink <|.. Coke
    ColdDrink <|.. Pepsi
    Meal o-- Item
    MealBuilder --> Meal
    Item --> Packing

    class Item {
        <<interface>>
        +string Name()
        +Packing Packing()
        +float Price()
    }

    class Packing {
        <<interface>>
        +string Pack()
    }

    class Wrapper {
        +string Pack()
    }

    class Bottle {
        +string Pack()
    }

    class Burger {
        <<abstract>>
        +string Name()
        +Packing Packing()
        +float Price()
    }

    class ColdDrink {
        <<abstract>>
        +string Name()
        +Packing Packing()
        +float Price()
    }

        +string Name()
        +float Price()
    }

        +void ShowItems()
    }

    class Person {
        - string name
        - string gender
        - string maritalStatus
        + Person(string name, string gender, string maritalStatus)
        + string GetName()
        + string GetGender()
        + string GetMaritalStatus()
    }

    class Criteria {
        <<interface>>
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    class CriteriaMale {
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    class CriteriaFemale {
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    class CriteriaSingle {
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    class AndCriteria {
        - Criteria criteria
        - Criteria Othercriteria
        + AndCriteria(Criteria criteria, Criteria Othercriteria)
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    class OrCriteria {
        - Criteria criteria
        - Criteria Othercriteria
        + OrCriteria(Criteria criteria, Criteria Othercriteria)
        + List<Person> MeetCriteria(List<Person> persons)
    }

    Person --> Criteria
    Criteria <|-- CriteriaMale
    Criteria <|-- CriteriaFemale
    Criteria <|-- CriteriaSingle
    Criteria <|-- AndCriteria
    Criteria <|-- OrCriteria
    AndCriteria --> Criteria

60e:T42f,classDiagram
    class ComputerPart {
        <<interface>>
        + Accept(ComputerPartVisitor visitor)
    }

    class Keyboard {
        + Accept(ComputerPartVisitor visitor)
    }

    class Mouse {
        + Accept(ComputerPartVisitor visitor)
    }

    class Monitor {
        + Accept(ComputerPartVisitor visitor)
    }

    class Computer {
        - ComputerPart[] parts
        + Accept(ComputerPartVisitor visitor)
    }

    class ComputerPartVisitor {
        <<interface>>
        + Visit(Computer computer)
        + Visit(Keyboard keyboard)
        + Visit(Mouse mouse)
        + Visit(Monitor monitor)
    }

    class ComputerPartDisplayVisitor {
        + Visit(Computer computer)
        + Visit(Keyboard keyboard)
        + Visit(Mouse mouse)
        + Visit(Monitor monitor)
    }

    ComputerPart <|.. Keyboard
    ComputerPart <|.. Mouse
    ComputerPart <|.. Monitor
    ComputerPart <|.. Computer
    ComputerPartVisitor <|.. ComputerPartDisplayVisitor
    Computer o-- ComputerPart
    ComputerPart --> ComputerPartVisitor : Accept(visitor)183:["$","$L1a1","mermaid-panel-31",{"source":"$60e","title":"$undefined"}]
